node.statement: UNIT LAW AND COMMUTATIVITY (exact). By GT-easy, the projected product a•b=P(a o b) on A satisfies the unit law 1•a=a and commutativity a•b=b•a EXACTLY (no eta error). These are precisely the two exact identities required by def-eps-jb-algebra (commutativity a o b=b o a and unit law 1 o a=a hold exactly), with the product symbol o of the definition realised by • on A.
